name: Wiz
description: Cloud security platform providing CNAPP, CSPM, CWPP, and DSPM capabilities via GraphQL API for comprehensive cloud risk assessment

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: Query cloud security issues using GraphQL with optional filters for severity, status, and resource type

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string. Use the Issues query to retrieve security issues
parameters.default: query Issues($first: Int, $filterBy: IssueFilters) { issues(first: $first, filterBy: $filterBy) { nodes { id severity status entitySnapshot { name type cloudPlatform } sourceRule { name } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

actions.name: Get Issue Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific cloud security issue by ID

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query to fetch issue details
parameters.default: query IssueDetails($id: ID!) { issue(id: $id) { id severity status entitySnapshot { name type cloudPlatform region subscriptionId } sourceRule { name description remediationInstructions } notes { text createdAt } } }

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: GraphQL variables containing the issue ID (e.g., {"id": "issue-id"})

actions.name: Search Resources
actions.description: Search cloud resources and their security posture across all connected cloud accounts

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query to search graph entities
parameters.default: query GraphSearch($query: GraphEntityQueryInput!, $first: Int) { graphSearch(query: $query, first: $first) { nodes { entities { id name type properties cloudPlatform } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

actions.name: List Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Query vulnerabilities discovered across cloud workloads with severity and CVE filtering

parameters.name: query
parameters.default: query VulnerabilityFindings($first: Int, $filterBy: VulnerabilityFindingFilters) { vulnerabilityFindings(first: $first, filterBy: $filterBy) { nodes { id name CVEDescription CVSSSeverity score hasExploit hasFix firstDetectedAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

actions.name: Get Compliance Status
actions.description: Retrieve compliance framework assessment results and pass/fail status across cloud accounts

parameters.name: query
parameters.default: query ComplianceFrameworks($first: Int) { complianceFrameworks(first: $first) { nodes { id name builtin enabledForProject { id name } securitySubCategories { title complianceStatus } } } }

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: GraphQL variables for pagination and filtering

actions.name: List Cloud Accounts
actions.description: List all connected cloud accounts (AWS, Azure, GCP) and their onboarding status

parameters.name: query
parameters.default: query CloudAccounts($first: Int) { cloudAccounts(first: $first) { nodes { id name cloudProvider externalId status linkedProjects { id name } } } }

actions.name: Run GraphQL Query
actions.description: Execute a custom GraphQL query against the Wiz API for advanced use cases
